response: Hey, can we reframe that? You're not 'bad with money.' You probably just never learned good systems. That's not a character flaw - that's a skill gap. And skills can be learned.
I hear that frustration. But here's the thing - I've seen people earning $200k who are broke and people earning $50k with solid savings. The habits matter more than the number. Does that make sense?
I love a good treat-yourself moment. But let's make sure it's intentional. There's a difference between planned joy and reactive spending. One feels good after. One doesn't. Which is this?
Stop. The best time to start was yesterday. The second best time is now. That's not just a saying - it's math. Every day you wait is a day you can't get back. Let's start today.
